titleStmt.title: SII 10.774: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 774. (A.R. No. 426 of 1923.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE SAME WALL. Ś. 1619. (Īśvara)

summary.p: Records that Gōparāju Prasannayya, Sthala-karaṇam of Bollavaram, granted two tūmus of land to the architect Musalaya, on the occasion of the consecration of the temple of Kāśī-Viśvanātha, while Aurang Pādshā was ruling at Āmudānagaram which was another name for Hastināpuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1619 Agu nēṭi
yīśvarasaṁvatsara kārtika śu 12 lu śrīmanmahārāja rājādhirāja śrīavaraṁgapā
duśāhu sāhēbuluvāru hastināpuraṁ pratināma maina Āmudānagaramaṁdu
ratna siṁhvāsanārūḍhu lai pṛthivi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu . kāśyapagōtra Āpasta
ṁbasūtra yajuśākhādhyāyu laina bolavaraṁ sthaḷakaraṇaṁ gōparājuvāri vaṁśōdbhavu
laina prasannayagāri pautṛ laina pāparāju putṛ ḍaina prasanayagāru Āpastaṁbasūtra mayānagō
tṛlaina diṁccanāla liṁgābattuni pautṛ ḍaina vīrābattuni putṛ ḍaina musalayaku yiccina bhūdānadharma
śilāśāsanaṁ nēmu kāśīviśvenādhuni pratiṣṭhacēsi dēvālayaṁ kūpapratiṣṭha nā
ḍu māku cellivaccē bolavaraṁ grāmāna daṁḍumānyaṁ dāmagaṭla polamēranu kō
lapāṭi rēgaḍana 2 yidmu mīku dhārabōsi yistimi trikaraṇatrivācakatriśuddhigā dhāra
bōsi yistimi ganuka mīputrapautrapāraṁparyaṁtaṁ Ācaṁdrārkaṁgānu Anubhaviṁcēdi
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavēt . svadattā putrikā dhātrī pitṛdattā ca sōdarī paradattā gurōḥpatnī vipra dattā vasuṁdharā .
Digital edition of SII 10.774 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
